title: Mythic SMP Animated Add-on
description: Revamps some of Mythic SMP, using animated textures
body:
This is an official add-on pack for the [Mythic SMP texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mythic-smp). Make sure you load this resource pack **ABOVE** the normal Mythic SMP pack if you want its changes to apply properly.

This pack introduces extra features through use of animated textures. This will work in your vanilla installation of Minecraft, no Optifine or other mods required!

**This add-on adds:**
- Animated runes on Nexusses
- A shining background to the padlock blocks in towers
- A shining overlay to Charged Mythic Shards
- A swirling texture and particles to Mythic Essence

**Planned for the future:**
- Animated staff textures
- Shining rune textures
